def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    df_output = df_input.copy()

    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight (weight difference)
    df_output['weight_difference'] = np.abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])

    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Distance and Right-Distance (distance difference)
    df_output['distance_difference'] = np.abs(df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])

    # Derive feature to indicate whether Left-Weight is greater than Right-Weight (weight imbalance direction)
    df_output['weight_imbalance_direction'] = np.where(df_output['Left-Weight'] > df_output['Right-Weight'], -1, np.where(df_output['Left-Weight'] < df_output['Right-Weight'], 1, 0))

    # Derive feature to calculate the difference in absolute value between Left-Weight and Right-Distance
    df_output['weight_distance_difference'] = np.abs(np.abs(df_output['Left-Weight']) - np.abs(df_output['Right-Distance']))

    return df_output
